name: lenix
description: Typed FiveM utilities for client, server, shared, and NUI scripts
author: Lenix

scripts.prepare: rm -rf ./client ./server ./shared ./nui && cp -R ../modules/client ./client && cp -R ../modules/server ./server && cp -R ../modules/shared ./shared && cp -R ../modules/nui ./nui && cp -R ../LICENSE ./
scripts.packpreview: rm -rf ./package-preview && mkdir -p ./package-preview && bun pm pack --destination ./package-preview && tar -xzf ./package-preview/*.tgz -C ./package-preview && find ./package-preview/package -type f | sort
